title: Ghost Eye City
content:
Ghost Eye City
 is a market city on 
Planet Tian Yun
. Its Ghost Eye Market rose to fame when it auctioned a rare complete Celestial Spell.

History
[
]

Three Chen Brothers took the security job of securing the Ghost Eye City during the period when its auction took place.

It was most likely destroyed due to the battle between 
Wang Lin
 and 
All-Seer
 and grey-robed All-Seer and 
Ling Tianhou
 that took place here.
